data.title: Law of Uniform Connectedness
data.description: Adobe maintains a uniform design language across its platforms.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design approach focuses on minimizing interaction time across interfaces.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The platform is optimized to reduce the time complexity of user decisions.

data.title: The Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Adobe's visual design enhances perceived usability and desirability.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Information is presented in chunks to improve comprehension and retention.
